title: invoke_subagent
description: Delegates a validated project prompt workspace definition down to a specialized execution subagent.

target_agent.description: The specific downstream AI subagent identity receiving the task context.

working_directory.description: Absolute file system root path of the target code repository.

requirements.description: List of system requirements parsed out of the workspace planning phase.

current_status.description: The tracking identifier indicating the current step in the development loop.
